steps.title: Identify the relationship
steps.content: Both sentences describe what guard cells help regulate (carbon dioxide intake, then water loss). The second adds another role to the first.

steps.title: Match the transition
steps.content:
Additionally signals an added piece of information, which fits perfectly. 'In conclusion' wraps up, 'Instead' contrasts, and 'Previously' marks time order.

That matches choice B — B is correct.
